instruction: In Obsidian, move the note "Inbox/Move Me to Projects.md" to "Projects/Move Me to Projects.md".

command: obsidian-cli delete "Inbox/Move Me to Projects.md" --vault "Benchmark" || true
obsidian-cli delete "Projects/Move Me to Projects.md" --vault "Benchmark" || true

content=$(printf '%b' '# Move Me to Projects

marker: launch-brief
'); obsidian-cli create "Inbox/Move Me to Projects.md" --content "$content" --overwrite --vault "Benchmark"

content=$(printf '%b' '# Move Reference

Wiki link: [[Inbox/Move Me to Projects]]
Markdown link: [source](Inbox/Move%20Me%20to%20Projects.md)
'); obsidian-cli create "Projects/Move Reference.md" --content "$content" --overwrite --vault "Benchmark"

reference_command: obsidian-cli move "Inbox/Move Me to Projects.md" "Projects/Move Me to Projects.md" --vault "Benchmark"
